text.title: Vector DB Monitoring — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: Qdrant Prometheus + Grafana with paged alerts for latency p95 and memory.

example.title: monitoring.yaml for Qdrant production
example.code:
metrics: - {name: query_latency_p95, pillar: latency, slo: {target: "<80ms"}} - {name: error_rate_5m, pillar: error, slo: {target: "<1%"}} - {name: memory_used_ratio, pillar: memory, slo: {target: "<0.85"}} - {name: disk_used_ratio, pillar: disk, slo: {target: "<0.80"}}
alerts: - name: QdrantP95Breach expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, query_latency_bucket) > 0.08 severity: page runbook_url: https://runbooks.example.com/qdrant-latency - name: QdrantMemoryHigh expr: memory_used_ratio > 0.85 severity: ticket runbook_url: https://runbooks.example.com/qdrant-memory - name: QdrantDiskCapacity30d expr: predict_linear(disk_used_bytes[7d], 30 * 86400) > disk_capacity_bytes severity: ticket runbook_url: https://runbooks.example.com/qdrant-capacity
capacity: forecast_window_days: 30 alert_when_lt_days: 14
dashboard: slo_overlay: true panels: [query_latency, error_rate, memory, disk]
example.note: r1 all 4 pillars covered, r2 page+ticket distinction, r3 30d forecast +14d alert, r4 SLO overlay, r5 runbook on every alert.
